def solve(grid):
    N = len(grid)
    ones = [(r, c) for r in range(N) for c in range(N) if grid[r][c] == 1]
    min_r = min(r for r, c in ones)
    max_r = max(r for r, c in ones)
    min_c = min(c for r, c in ones)
    max_c = max(c for r, c in ones)
    h = max_r - min_r + 1
    w = max_c - min_c + 1
    result = []
    for i in range(h):
        row = []
        for j in range(w):
            mr = N - 1 - (min_r + i)
            mc = N - 1 - (min_c + j)
            row.append(grid[mr][mc])
        result.append(row)
    return result
